DD01-004.name: If you lose the race against Turbo Granny...

effects.text: Main: If you have 5 or more DON!! cards on your field, play up to one [Turbo Granny Form] stage card from your deck. Then, shuffle your deck.
Trigger: Activate this card's Main effect.
Main: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Dandadan} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
Trigger: Activate this card's Main effect.

DD01-011.name: If its for Momo-chan, I can go All-out!

effects.text: Main: Take 1 damage: Set 1 of your [Okarun] cards as active.
Trigger: Set 1 of your [Okarun] cards as active.
Main: You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards: give up to one of your {Dandadan} type characters +4000 power for 1 battle. That character also gains Unblockable for that battle.
Counter: If your leader is rested, give your leader or 1 of your {Dandadan} type characters +3000 power during this battle.
Counter: Up to 1 of your {Eggman Empire} cards gets +4000 power during this battle.
Main: You may give your leader -5000 power during this turn: Activate your leader's When Attacking ability.
Counter: One of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle.

BK01-002.name: Get that... to the Black Swordsman

effects.text: Main: Give up to 1 of your [Guts] or [Skull Knight] Characters +5000 power for this turn. When that Character attacks, your opponent cannot activate Blocker during this battle, then add the top of your Life cards to your hand.
Trigger: Give 1 of your leaders +1000 power until the end of the turn.

BK01-011.name: ...Indeed It Was Like a Heap of Raw Iron.

effects.text: Main: Give up to 1 of your opponent's characters -2 cost until the end of this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.
Main: If your leader is [Guts], give your leader up to 1 rested DON!! Then, K.O. one of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.

Main: If your leader is [Kurosaki Ichigo], give all of your Characters and up to one of your Leader +5000 power. Then, your Leader gains Unblockable during this turn. If you do not win the game until the end of this turn, you lose the game.
Counter: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, that card gains an additional +2000 power.
Trigger: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.
Main: You may rest 7 of your DON!! cards: If your Leader is [Kurosaki Ichigo], place up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your life cards.
Counter: Your Leader gains +3000 power during this battle.
